Conferences: The Next Wave

August 1998
Journalism & Newsroom

IRE and NICAR have announced upcoming national and regional conferences for 1999, including NICAR's conference in Boston in March and IRE's conference in Kansas City in June, with registration information available online.

Information on upcoming IRE and NICAR national and regional conferences is now available on the IRE Web site at www.ire.org/resources/conferences/index.html.

NICAR's national conference, co-sponsored by the Boston Globe, will be held March 11-14, 1999 in Boston, Mass. IRE's national conference, co-sponsored by the Kansas City Star and KCTV, will be held June 3-6, 1999 in Kansas City, Mo. Downloadable registration forms and other information are posted on the site.

For information on other events-including boot camps, on-the-road training, and an IRE regional conference to be held Sept. 9-12, 1999 in Los Angeles - point your browser to www.ire.org/calendar.htmL.
